en.text: a primitive root; properly, to surround with a stockade, and thus separate from the open country; but used only in the reduplicated form ; or (2 Chronicles 5:12) ; as dem. from H2689; to trumpet, i.e. blow on that instrument

senses.gloss_en: a primitive root; properly, to surround with a stockade, and thus separate from the open country; but used only in the reduplicated form ; or (2 Chronicles 5:12) ; as dem. from H2689; to trumpet, i.e. blow on that instrument
